records.m_Talk_ENG: that you'll be with her, no matter the consequences.

records.m_Talk_DEU: sie an dich zu binden, egal was auch geschieht.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Having decided that, you called her to your office. She said she'd be here soon.

records.m_Talk_FRA: Fort de cette d959cision, vous l'avez convoqu959e dans votre bureau. Elle ne devrait pas tarder.

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...Didn't I make myself clear, Coach?
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...Didn't I make myself clear, Coach?
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...Didn't I make myself clear, Coach?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Unless it's something really important, don't call me when I'm in this damn suit.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Unless it's something really important, don't call me when I'm in this damn suit.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Unless it's something really important, don't call me when I'm in this damn suit.

records.m_Talk_ENG: You do realize that being alone with you while I'm dressed like this... is practically an open invitation for gossip, right...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: You do realize that being alone with you while I'm dressed like this... is practically an open invitation for gossip, right...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: You do realize that being alone with you while I'm dressed like this... is practically an open invitation for gossip, right...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, you sure you're okay with that? What if the other employees see us?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, you sure you're okay with that? What if the other employees see us?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, you sure you're okay with that? What if the other employees see us?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What? You don't care?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What? You don't care?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What? You don't care?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Come on, you're the Boss. Ever heard of reputation management?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Come on, you're the Boss. Ever heard of reputation management?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Come on, you're the Boss. Ever heard of reputation management?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Honestly, you're sneakier than you look... Though I guess that laid-back attitude is part of your charm...
records.m_Talk_DEU: Honestly, you're sneakier than you look... Though I guess that laid-back attitude is part of your charm...
records.m_Talk_FRA: Honestly, you're sneakier than you look... Though I guess that laid-back attitude is part of your charm...

records.m_Talk_ENG: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_DEU: Ahem...!
records.m_Talk_FRA: Ahem...!

records.m_Talk_ENG: So? You had me come straight to your office without even letting me change...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: So? You had me come straight to your office without even letting me change...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: So? You had me come straight to your office without even letting me change...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's got you in such a rush?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's got you in such a rush?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's got you in such a rush?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Wait, is this... a lifetime contract...?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Wait, is this... a lifetime contract...?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Wait, is this... a lifetime contract...?

records.m_Talk_ENG: You called me all the way here for this? Come on, you know I'd say yes without hesitation.
records.m_Talk_DEU: You called me all the way here for this? Come on, you know I'd say yes without hesitation.
records.m_Talk_FRA: You called me all the way here for this? Come on, you know I'd say yes without hesitation.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Think this is the most I can do?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Think this is the most I can do?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Think this is the most I can do?

records.m_Talk_ENG: What's more, you ask? Hmm, I guess that depends on how wild your imagination, Coach.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What's more, you ask? Hmm, I guess that depends on how wild your imagination, Coach.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What's more, you ask? Hmm, I guess that depends on how wild your imagination, Coach.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Keke, I'm just messing with you. Why so stiff?
records.m_Talk_DEU: Keke, I'm just messing with you. Why so stiff?
records.m_Talk_FRA: Keke, I'm just messing with you. Why so stiff?

records.m_Talk_ENG: ...You see.
records.m_Talk_DEU: ...You see.
records.m_Talk_FRA: ...You see.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I've always lived by other people's rules.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I've always lived by other people's rules.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I've always lived by other people's rules.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What a screwed-up life. It was the same in Sputnik, same at Mansion.
records.m_Talk_DEU: What a screwed-up life. It was the same in Sputnik, same at Mansion.
records.m_Talk_FRA: What a screwed-up life. It was the same in Sputnik, same at Mansion.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I went through all that for nothing. And in the end... I was the only one left.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I went through all that for nothing. And in the end... I was the only one left.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I went through all that for nothing. And in the end... I was the only one left.

records.m_Talk_ENG: What now, Coach? Are you seriously trying to cheer me up?
records.m_Talk_DEU: What now, Coach? Are you seriously trying to cheer me up?
records.m_Talk_FRA: What now, Coach? Are you seriously trying to cheer me up?

records.m_Talk_ENG: Forget it. This isn't something worth crying over.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Forget it. This isn't something worth crying over.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Forget it. This isn't something worth crying over.

records.m_Talk_ENG: I told you already. I'm a loaded gun, and I've got no plans to live any differently.
records.m_Talk_DEU: I told you already. I'm a loaded gun, and I've got no plans to live any differently.
records.m_Talk_FRA: I told you already. I'm a loaded gun, and I've got no plans to live any differently.

records.m_Talk_ENG: But if it's with you, Coach...
records.m_Talk_DEU: But if it's with you, Coach...
records.m_Talk_FRA: But if it's with you, Coach...

records.m_Talk_ENG: If it's with you... maybe I'll finally figure out why I was the only one who crawled out of that hell.
records.m_Talk_DEU: If it's with you... maybe I'll finally figure out why I was the only one who crawled out of that hell.
records.m_Talk_FRA: If it's with you... maybe I'll finally figure out why I was the only one who crawled out of that hell.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Well, you're probably the only person in this world who could ever tame me.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Well, you're probably the only person in this world who could ever tame me.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Well, you're probably the only person in this world who could ever tame me.

records.m_Talk_ENG: So, hand me that contract.
records.m_Talk_DEU: So, hand me that contract.
records.m_Talk_FRA: So, hand me that contract.

records.m_Talk_ENG: Whatever you're after, I'm in. I'll bet my life on it.
records.m_Talk_DEU: Whatever you're after, I'm in. I'll bet my life on it.
records.m_Talk_FRA: Whatever you're after, I'm in. I'll bet my life on it.
